summary: Backend-only testing of CCTV quote API. All 11 pytest cases passed (100%). Verified health/root endpoints, quote creation contract, MongoDB persistence with _id exclusion, full Pydantic validation matrix (invalid email, short phone, missing fields, short message, short name), honeypot rejection (400 + non-persistence), and Resend soft-fail contract (email fails to non-verified address but quote still persists with 200).
critical_code_review_comments: Honeypot rejection returns 400 with detail 'Invalid submission'. Spec is fine, but consider returning 200 with a fake-success body to avoid signalling bots that the honeypot exists. Low priority.

DESTINATION_EMAIL bothwell@consultant.com cannot receive emails in Resend test mode (only kofajic346@ellbit.com is verified). For production, verify a domain at resend.com/domains and update SENDER_EMAIL to use that domain. Currently email_sent will always be false in DB until that is done — this is the documented mocked/sandbox behavior.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager. Non-blocking.
GET /api/quotes is unauthenticated and returns up to 200 quote requests including PII (email, phone, message). Should be protected behind admin auth before any production use.
seed_data_creation: Test quotes inserted with TEST_ prefixed names (TEST_John Doe, TEST_EmailSoftFail). Not cleaned up — present in MongoDB quote_requests collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend contract is solid. All endpoints under /api work as specified. Next iteration can focus on frontend form integration → POST /api/quote, success/error toasts, mobile responsiveness, dark mode contrast, WhatsApp link, and design QA. Note Resend test-mode means email_sent=false is the expected DB state until a verified domain is configured.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Resend send failures are handled correctly via try/except in _send_quote_email; doc is inserted regardless of email outcome, satisfying the persistence-over-delivery contract.
